Motion And Notice Of Hearing For Order Confirming Arbitration Award
Off Calendar May-10-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Drew Teti of Law Offices of Drew Teti telephone number 415-813-1177 for Plaintiff Express Parking.
No other appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court confirmed its tentative ruling. PETITIONER EXPRESS PARKING INC.'S Motion For Order Confirming Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Not reported. (302/HK)
